highlights.title: Musk Says Tesla, SpaceX, xAI Chip Project to Kick Off in Texas
highlights.description: Elon Musk said his Terafab project — a grand plan to eventually manufacture his own chips for robotics, artificial intelligence and space data centers — will be built in Austin and jointly run by Tesla and SpaceX.

highlights.title: Apple CEO Praises China Partners as Beijing Applies Pressure
highlights.description: Apple Inc. Chief Executive Officer Tim Cook commended Chinese developers and the company’s partners in the country, days after the ruling party’s flagship newspaper criticized the iPhone maker for monopolistic policies.
